title: AI in Indonesia 2025: Infrastructure, Talent & Regulation
body:
## Table of Contents
1. Introduction
2. Market Opportunity
3. Infrastructure Reality
4. Talent Landscape
5. Regulatory Framework

---

## Introduction

As a developer working in or with Indonesia, understanding the AI landscape is crucial. This technical analysis covers infrastructure, talent gaps, and regulatory challenges facing the world's 4th most populous nation.

## Market Opportunity

Indonesia's digital economy at $130B by 2025. Startup adoption of AI is accelerating across Gojek, Traveloka, Bukalapak.

## Infrastructure Reality

Only 65% internet penetration means building AI for offline-first scenarios. Edge computing is not optional.

## Talent Landscape

400K annual shortfall of digital talent. Need 600K/year, produce only 200K.

## Regulatory Framework

UU PDP is a start but AI-specific regulation needed for bias, transparency, accountability.
